creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2008-06-06 13:08:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    benchmarks/autobench Makefile 
    benchmarks/gsbench   Makefile 
    benchmarks/gtkperf   Makefile 
    benchmarks/imb       Makefile 
    benchmarks/mdtest    Makefile 
    benchmarks/scimark2  Makefile 
  Log:
  Bump portrevision due to upgrade of devel/gettext.
  
  The affected ports are the ones with gettext as a run-dependency
  according to ports/INDEX-7 (5007 of them) and the ones with USE_GETTEXT
  in Makefile (29 of them).
  
  PR:             ports/124340
  Submitted by:   edwin@
  Approved by:    portmgr (pav)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.8       +1 -1      ports/benchmarks/autobench/Makefile
  1.5       +1 -1      ports/benchmarks/gsbench/Makefile
  1.10      +1 -1      ports/benchmarks/gtkperf/Makefile
  1.8       +1 -1      ports/benchmarks/imb/Makefile
  1.3       +1 -1      ports/benchmarks/mdtest/Makefile
  1.5       +1 -1      ports/benchmarks/scimark2/Makefile
